Error tracking spike detected in PostHog in an older Error Tracking area, not the new Signals autonomy code. A sharp spike of symbolication and release-association failures started after a sequence of changes around symbol sets, releases, and grouping rules. The failures consistently look like classic Error Tracking regressions in the posthog/posthog repo and point to posthog/models/error_tracking/error_tracking.py around ErrorTrackingSymbolSet last_used updates, symbol set cleanup on deletion, release model handling, and custom grouping rules. Recent stack traces mention symbol set lookup and stale release metadata during spike processing, and the affected code paths line up with the older Error Tracking model layer rather than products/signals/*.
